title: Improve docs site branding and dark mode
summary: Updated the Fumadocs/Next.js docs site to use the existing eve logo, lowercase eve branding, the tagline git tracks code, eve tracks product, and a more polished landing page.
userVisibleChange: Visitors see a cleaner eve landing page and readable dark-mode documentation, including visible sidebar text and logo treatment.

risks.title: Dark-mode contrast regressions could return if Fumadocs token names change.

decisions.title: Use the existing ui/public/eve.svg asset in the docs site instead of a text-only wordmark.
Keep fork-facing setup commands focused on the product UI and CLI rather than requiring the docs site for normal local use.

validation.command: Playwright verified the landing page at http://127.0.0.1:4328 and dark-mode docs at /docs/guides/get-started with zero browser console errors or warnings.
